author: Bastions
text:
SPEC: correct bl-2bf7 scope; point plugin-side remainder at bl-fb4d

bl-2bf7 (delivered) shipped only the git-remote review/close sync+rollback slice; §12 and §14 step 7 wrongly implied it rewired the plugin dispatch call sites. Both now state bl-2bf7's real git-remote scope and name bl-fb4d for the deferred plugin-participant command-level consumption (rollback/non-zero on required plugin failure or reject, EventCtx task_before/commit threading, §11 override log + sync_status).

Audited all SPEC ball refs: bl-d31c/eae4/1ea6/b1dd/50c5/4e7d/8b71/a46d all have delivery commits on main (accurate provenance, original planning tense, intentionally left). bl-2bf7 was the only substantively misleading reference. Docs-only change; gate green.
